items.title: The Lakers can finally have nice (athletic) things.
items.author: Iztok Franko
items.body_excerpt:
The Lakers can finally have nice (athletic) things.

Thoughts from an incredibly fun Summer League game:
- Carr's multi-level scoring flashes
- Thiero's encouraging small steps
- Mañon's relentless ball pressure

Plus why this has me dreaming a little.
digginbasketball.substack.com/p/lakers-sum...

items.title: Good night from the Thomas & Mack Center.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
Good night from the Thomas & Mack Center.

At the nearby Cox Pavilion, the Celtics kicked off Summer League by rallying for a win over the Raptors in an OT thriller.

Amile Jefferson: “I thought we did a great job of, every time they threw punches at us…we fought back…We never wavered.”

Nice pair of dunks to close the half though!
